topRepos.name: file-vault-mcp
topRepos.description: Model Context Protocol server exposing scoped CRUD over a vault directory — drop-in for Claude Desktop, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible agent host.

topRepos.name: AgentLoop
topRepos.description: Experimental TypeScript runtime for the canonical agent loop — model call, tool dispatch, observation, repeat — with deterministic state snapshots between steps.

topRepos.name: Figma-i18n-Extractor
topRepos.description: Figma plugin that walks every text node in a frame and exports structured JSON for i18next, FormatJS, and custom localization pipelines.

topRepos.name: Rule-Engine-v1
topRepos.description: Configurable rule engine v1 in TypeScript — declarative conditions, composable actions, and a small evaluator core.

topRepos.name: token-trading-table
topRepos.description: Trading table UI built around token-style state cells — experiment in dense data layouts with React + TS.

topRepos.name: resume-builder
topRepos.description: Drag-and-drop résumé builder in JavaScript — composable section blocks, live preview, JSON-driven layout.

topRepos.name: Customer-Labs-React-Test
topRepos.description: React + TypeScript take-home for Customer Labs — typed data flow, performance-friendly list rendering, design-system primitives.

topRepos.name: Thoughts-of-Jana
topRepos.description: Personal writing space and rough-cut ideas in TypeScript — markdown-first, opinion-second.
